title: MELANOTAN 2
description: Melanotan 2 is a synthetic peptide that stimulates melanin production for tanning, increases libido, and may suppress appetite. It acts on melanocortin receptors and produces faster, more pronounced effects than MT-1.

research.title: Melanotan II: a possible cause of renal infarction: review of the literature and case report
research.summary: Examines renal infarction as a rare complication potentially induced by Melanotan II, reviewing mechanisms including blood clot formation.

research.title: Melanotan-II reverses memory impairment induced by a short-term HF diet
research.summary: Demonstrates that Melanotan-II reversed negative neurobehavioral effects caused by high-fat diet in zebrafish models.

research.title: Melanocortin receptor agonist melanotan-II microinjected in the nucleus accumbens decreases appetitive and consumptive responding for food
research.summary: Found that melanotan-II injection reduced food intake motivation in mice without causing adverse effects.

research.title: The potent melanocortin receptor agonist melanotan-II promotes peripheral nerve regeneration and has neuroprotective properties in the rat
research.summary: Tested melanotan-II for nerve recovery in rats, finding significant sensory function improvement and cisplatin toxicity protection.

research.title: The protective effects of the melanocortin receptor agonist, melanotan-II, against binge-like ethanol drinking are facilitated by deletion of the MC3 receptor in mice
research.summary: Found melanotan-II successfully reduces binge alcohol consumption through specific receptor mechanisms.

sentiment.summary: Popular for tanning and libido effects. Users report fast results but more side effects than MT-1. Concerns about mole changes and long-term safety exist.

effects.label: Fast Acting:
effects.description: Visible tanning within days to weeks.

effects.label: Variable Tanning:
effects.description: Results depend on baseline skin tone.

sideEffects.label: Mole Changes:
sideEffects.description: Darkening and potential changes to moles.

availability.label: Not Approved:
availability.description: Not FDA approved for any indication.
